heading: Notification of certain regulations that impact the National Nuclear Security Administration
label: 6127 Notification of certain regulations that impact the National Nuclear Security Administration
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , which was set out as a note under , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 3125 of Pub. L. 118–159section 2538 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(12)

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: If a director of a national security laboratory of the Administration determines that a Federal regulation could inhibit the ability of the Administrator to maintain the safety, security, or effectiveness of the nuclear weapons stockpile without engaging in explosive nuclear testing, such director, not later than 15 days after making such determination, shall submit to Congress a notification of such determination.

children.heading: .—Form
children.label: b .—Form
children.text: Each notification required by subsection (a) shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.
